overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval-style courtyard garden featuring a central fountain, surrounded by stone walls, lush greenery, and blooming flowers. Small glowing butterflies or magical particles float gently through the air, creating a serene atmosphere. The high-quality rendering suggests Unreal Engine or similar game engine technology.

segments.scene_description: A tranquil courtyard garden scene rendered in a game engine, featuring a central circular fountain surrounded by cobblestone paving. Historic stone walls with an arched gateway form the backdrop, while lush trees and flowering bushes frame the sides. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the serene environment with floating particles drifting through the air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a tranquil medieval courtyard garden that maintains a consistent atmosphere of serene magic. It begins with a focus on a central circular fountain set amidst weathered cobblestone paving. As the eye wanders, the scene expands to reveal historic stone walls and an arched gateway that anchor the backdrop. Lush trees and flowering bushes frame the periphery, while glowing particles drift gently through the air to complete the ethereal environment.
